tables.name: Address
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "Address"
(
    AddressID       INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,
    AddressLine1    TEXT                               not null,
    AddressLine2    TEXT,
    City            TEXT                               not null,
    StateProvinceID INTEGER                            not null
        references StateProvince,
    PostalCode      TEXT                               not null,
    SpatialLocation TEXT,
    rowguid         TEXT                               not null
        unique,
    ModifiedDate    DATETIME default current_timestamp not null,
    unique (AddressLine1, AddressLine2, City, StateProvinceID, PostalCode)
)

bird_description.description: Unique id number identifying the address.
bird_description.value_description: Primary key for Address records. Identity / Auto increment column.

bird_description.description: First street address line.
Second street address line.
bird_description.value_description:
commonsense evidence:
1. total address = (AddressLine1+AddressLine2) 
2. if AddressLine2 is not null, it means the address is too long

bird_description.description: Name of the city.
Identification number for the state or province.
Postal code for the street address.
Latitude and longitude of this address.
Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: AddressType
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "AddressType"
(
    AddressTypeID INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,
    Name          TEXT                               not null
        unique,
    rowguid       TEXT                               not null
        unique,
    ModifiedDate  DATETIME default current_timestamp not null
)

bird_description.description: Unique numbers identifying address type records.
bird_description.value_description: Primary key for AddressType records. Identity / Auto increment column.

bird_description.description: Address type description.
Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: BillOfMaterials
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "BillOfMaterials"
(
    BillOfMaterialsID INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,
    ProductAssemblyID INTEGER
        references Product,
    ComponentID       INTEGER                            not null
        references Product,
    StartDate         DATETIME default current_timestamp not null,
    EndDate           DATETIME,
    UnitMeasureCode   TEXT                               not null
        references UnitMeasure,
    BOMLevel          INTEGER                            not null,
    PerAssemblyQty    REAL     default 1.00              not null,
    ModifiedDate      DATETIME default current_timestamp not null,
    unique (ProductAssemblyID, ComponentID, StartDate)
)

bird_description.description: The unique number identifying bill of materials.
bird_description.value_description: Primary key for BillOfMaterials records. Identity / Auto increment column.

bird_description.description: Parent product identification number.
Component identification number.
Date the component started being used in the assembly item.
Date the component stopped being used in the assembly item.
bird_description.value_description:
commonsense evidence:
1. assembly item duration = (EndDate - StartDate) 
2. if EndDate is null, it means the assembly item doesn't finish (still going on).

bird_description.description: Standard code identifying the unit of measure for the quantity.
Indicates the depth the component is from its parent (column2)(AssemblyID).
Quantity of the component needed to create the assembly.
Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: BusinessEntity
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "BusinessEntity"
(
    BusinessEntityID INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,
    rowguid          TEXT                               not null
        unique,
    ModifiedDate     DATETIME default current_timestamp not null
)

bird_description.description: Unique number of identifying business entity.
bird_description.value_description: Primary key for all customers, vendors, and employees. Identity / Auto increment column

bird_description.description: Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: BusinessEntityAddress
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE BusinessEntityAddress
(
    BusinessEntityID INTEGER                                 not null,
    AddressID        INTEGER                                 not null,
    AddressTypeID    INTEGER                                 not null,
    rowguid          TEXT                         not null
            unique,
    ModifiedDate     DATETIME default current_timestamp not null,
    primary key (BusinessEntityID, AddressID, AddressTypeID),
    foreign key (AddressID) references Address(AddressID),
    foreign key (AddressTypeID) references AddressType(AddressTypeID),
    foreign key (BusinessEntityID) references BusinessEntity(BusinessEntityID)
)

bird_description.description: Number identifying the business entity.
Number identifying the address.
Number identifying the address type.
Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.

    foreign key (BusinessEntityID) references BusinessEntity(BusinessEntityID),
    foreign key (ContactTypeID) references ContactType(ContactTypeID),
    foreign key (PersonID) references Person(BusinessEntityID)
)

The id number identifying the Person ID.
The id number identifying the contact type ID.

Exchange rate was converted from this currency code.
Exchange rate was converted to this currency code.

The id number identifying the person.
The id number identifying the store / bussiness entity.
ID of the territory in which the customer is located.
Unique number identifying the customer assigned by the accounting system.
Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.

bird_description.description: The unique hierarchy id identifying the document nodes.
Depth in the document hierarchy.
Title of the document.
Employee who controls the document.
The type of the folders.
bird_description.value_description: 0 = This is a folder, 1 = This is a document. Default: 0

bird_description.description: Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
File extension indicating the document type.
Revision number of the document.
Engineering change approval number.
Status of document processing.
Document abstract.
bird_description.value_description:
commonsense evidence:
if no document Summary: it means this document is private

bird_description.description: Complete document.
Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Employee

CREATE TABLE Employee
(

    NationalIDNumber  TEXT                          not null

            unique,

    JobTitle          TEXT                          not null,
    BirthDate         DATE                                 not null,
    MaritalStatus     TEXT                                 not null,
    Gender            TEXT                                 not null,
    HireDate          DATE                                 not null,
    SalariedFlag      INTEGER default 1                 not null,
    VacationHours     INTEGER   default 0                 not null,
    SickLeaveHours    INTEGER   default 0                 not null,
    CurrentFlag       INTEGER default 1                 not null,
    rowguid           TEXT                          not null
            unique,
    ModifiedDate      DATETIME  default current_timestamp not null,
    foreign key (BusinessEntityID) references Person(BusinessEntityID)
)

bird_description.description: The id number identifying the employee.
The national identification number such as a social security number.
Network login.
Where the employee is located in corporate hierarchy.
The depth of the employee in the corporate hierarchy.
Work title such as Buyer or Sales Representative.
Date of birth.
Whether this employee is married or not.
The gender of this employee.
The employee was hired on this date.
Job classification.
bird_description.value_description: 0 = Hourly, not exempt from collective bargaining. 1 = Salaried, exempt from collective bargaining.

bird_description.description: The number of available vacation hours.
The number of available sick leave hours.
Whether this employee is active or not
Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Person
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE Person
(
    BusinessEntityID      INTEGER                                  not null
        primary key,
    PersonType            TEXT                              not null,
    NameStyle             INTEGER default 0                 not null,
    Title                 TEXT,
    FirstName             TEXT                         not null,
    MiddleName            TEXT,
    LastName              TEXT                         not null,
    Suffix                TEXT,
    EmailPromotion        INTEGER        default 0                 not null,
    AdditionalContactInfo TEXT,
    Demographics          TEXT,
    rowguid               TEXT                          not null
            unique,
    ModifiedDate          DATETIME  default current_timestamp not null,
    foreign key (BusinessEntityID) references BusinessEntity(BusinessEntityID)
)

bird_description.description: The unique id number identifying the person.
The type of person.
bird_description.value_description: Primary type of person: SC = Store Contact, IN = Individual (retail) customer, SP = Sales person, EM = Employee (non-sales), VC = Vendor contact, GC = General contact

bird_description.description: Name Style.
bird_description.value_description: 0 = The data in FirstName and LastName are stored in western style (first name, last name) order. 1 = Eastern style (last name, first name) order. Default: 0

bird_description.description: A courtesy title.
First name of the person.
Middle name or middle initial of the person.
Last name of the person.
Surname suffix.
Email Promotion.
bird_description.value_description: 0 = Contact does not wish to receive e-mail promotions, 1 = Contact does wish to receive e-mail promotions from AdventureWorks, 2 = Contact does wish to receive e-mail promotions from AdventureWorks and selected partners. Default: 0

bird_description.description: Additional contact information about the person stored in xml format.
Personal information such as hobbies, and income collected from online shoppers. Used for sales analysis.
Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.

tables.name: Product
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "Product"
(
    ProductID             INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,
    Name                  TEXT                               not null
        unique,
    ProductNumber         TEXT                               not null
        unique,
    MakeFlag              INTEGER  default 1                 not null,
    FinishedGoodsFlag     INTEGER  default 1                 not null,
    Color                 TEXT,
    SafetyStockLevel      INTEGER                            not null,
    ReorderPoint          INTEGER                            not null,
    StandardCost          REAL                               not null,
    ListPrice             REAL                               not null,
    Size                  TEXT,
    SizeUnitMeasureCode   TEXT
        references UnitMeasure,
    WeightUnitMeasureCode TEXT
        references UnitMeasure,
    Weight                REAL,
    DaysToManufacture     INTEGER                            not null,
    ProductLine           TEXT,
    Class                 TEXT,
    Style                 TEXT,
    ProductSubcategoryID  INTEGER
        references ProductSubcategory,
    ProductModelID        INTEGER
        references ProductModel,
    SellStartDate         DATETIME                           not null,
    SellEndDate           DATETIME,
    DiscontinuedDate      DATETIME,
    rowguid               TEXT                               not null
        unique,
    ModifiedDate          DATETIME default current_timestamp not null
)

bird_description.description: The unique id number identifying the product.
Name of the product.
The unique product identification number.
The source of product make.
bird_description.value_description: 0 = Product is purchased, 1 = Product is manufactured in-house. Default: 1

bird_description.description: Whether the product is salable or not.
bird_description.value_description: 0 = Product is not a salable item. 1 = Product is salable. Default: 1

bird_description.description: Color
The minimum inventory quantity.
Inventory level that triggers a purchase order or work order.
Standard cost of the product.
Selling price
Product size
Unit of measure for Size column.
Unit of measure for Weight column.
Product weight
Number of days required to manufacture the product.
Product Routine
bird_description.value_description: R = Road, M = Mountain, T = Touring, S = Standard

bird_description.description: Product quality class
bird_description.value_description: H = High, M = Medium, L = Low

bird_description.description: Style
bird_description.value_description: W = Womens, M = Mens, U = Universal

bird_description.description: Product is a member of this product subcategory.
Product is a member of this product model.
Date the product was available for sale.
Date the product was no longer available for sale.
Date the product was discontinued.
Uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.

Product photo identification number.
Whether this photo is the principal image or not.
bird_description.value_description:
0 = Photo is not the principal image. 
1 = Photo is the principal image. 
commonsense evidence:
staff can mention "principal" in the question in order to make the question more realistic.

tables.name: ProductReview

The name of reviewer.
Date review was submitted.
Reviewer's e-mail address.

Scale is 1 to 5 with 5 as the highest rating.

tables.name: ProductVendor

CREATE TABLE ProductVendor
(

    MaxOrderQty      INTEGER                             not null,
    OnOrderQty       INTEGER,
    UnitMeasureCode  TEXT                             not null,
    ModifiedDate     DATETIME default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP not null,
    primary key (ProductID, BusinessEntityID),
    foreign key (ProductID) references Product(ProductID),
    foreign key (BusinessEntityID) references Vendor(BusinessEntityID),
    foreign key (UnitMeasureCode) references UnitMeasure(UnitMeasureCode)
)

bird_description.description: The id number identifying the products.
The id number identifying the business entities.
The average span of time between placing an order with the vendor and receiving the purchased product.
The vendor's usual selling price.
The selling price when last purchased.
bird_description.value_description:
commonsense evidence:
profit on net can be computed by LastReceiptCost - StandardPrice

bird_description.description: Date the product was last received by the vendor.
The maximum quantity that should be ordered.
The minimum quantity that should be ordered.
The quantity currently on order.
bird_description.value_description: if it's equal to 0, it means "out of stock"

bird_description.description: The product's unit of measure.
Date and time the record was last updated.

    ReceivedQty           REAL                            not null,
    RejectedQty           REAL                            not null,
    StockedQty            REAL                            not null,

)

bird_description.description: Purchase order number.
Unique purchase detail order.
Date the product is expected to be received.
Quantity ordered.
The id number identifying products.
Vendor's selling price of a single product.
Per product subtotal
bird_description.value_description: Computed as OrderQty * UnitPrice. Computed: isnull([OrderQty]*[UnitPrice],(0.00))

bird_description.description: Quantity actually received from the vendor.

tables.name: PurchaseOrderHeader
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE PurchaseOrderHeader
(
    PurchaseOrderID INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,

    Status          INTEGER        default 1                 not null,

    VendorID        INTEGER                                  not null,
    ShipMethodID    INTEGER                                  not null,
    OrderDate       DATETIME      default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP not null,
    ShipDate        DATETIME,
    SubTotal        REAL default 0.0000            not null,
    TaxAmt          REAL default 0.0000            not null,
    Freight         REAL default 0.0000            not null,
    TotalDue        REAL                          not null,
    ModifiedDate    DATETIME      default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP not null,
    foreign key (EmployeeID) references Employee(BusinessEntityID),
    foreign key (VendorID) references Vendor(BusinessEntityID),
    foreign key (ShipMethodID) references ShipMethod(ShipMethodID)
)

bird_description.description: The unique id number identifying purchase order.
Incremental number to track changes to the purchase order over time.
Order current status.
Employee who created the purchase order.
Vendor with whom the purchase order is placed.
Shipping method
Purchase order creation date
Estimated shipment date from the vendor.
Purchase order subtotal
bird_description.value_description: Computed as SUM (PurchaseOrderDetail.LineTotal)for the appropriate PurchaseOrderID

bird_description.description: Tax amount
Shipping cost
Total due to vendor
bird_description.value_description: Computed as Subtotal + TaxAmt + Freight. Computed: isnull(([SubTotal]+[TaxAmt])+[Freight],(0))

bird_description.description: Date and time the record was last updated.
